g.text: STREAM POOL SYSTEM: ARCHITECTURE & MEMORY SPECIFICATION

ul.li: Dashed Line: Reference or Logical Control Flow

ol.li: Indexing: next_stream counter must wrap-around via num_streams modulo to prevent OOB access.
Cleanup: RAII implementation must call cudaStreamDestroy for all array elements and cudaFreeHost for pinned segments.
Concurrency: All modifications to next_stream must be atomic (Memory Order: Relaxed is sufficient for RR).
Bus Invariants: cudaHostAlloc flag cudaHostAllocMapped must be set for zero-copy access if supported.
